rulings.Case Title: GARRITT BLANZ ET AL VS. ROBERT C HINCKLEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Renewed Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 3, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF GARRITT BLANZ, DAVID BLANZ Notice Of Renewed Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint GRANTED. First Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MITCHELL BOYD ET AL VS. CARLA CLAY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 3, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT KELLY DORAN AMENDED MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND OFF CALENDAR, Amended Notice for July 24, 2019 on file. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BRUNO BALDINI VS. CHRISTINA VASQUEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 3, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT ANGIE HO, CRISTINA VAZQUEZ MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Off Calendar. Dismissal on file. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MINEOLA N. FORTSON VS. GUY HARTMAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 3, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT GUY HARTMAN, ROBIN HARTMAN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. No opposition filed. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO ZEN CENTER, A CALIFORNINA VS. ANNETTE LORENZO
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 3, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT ANNETTE LORENZO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to state a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BRICK & TIMBER, INC. VS. BRENDA FSS JOHNSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 3, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT BRENDA JOHNSON MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS Hearing Required. Defendant to present (file and provide a courtesy copy) a valid proof of service for the motion. Proof of Service stating that Sadie Weller "caused" the motion to be served is insufficient. Ms. Johnson and Edgar Mendez to be present. = (501/CFH)
